title: Volume 01 — Hooded Garter Dress
description: Ruched hooded mini, detachable sleeves, over-knee socks.
alt: Model in a black hooded ruched mini dress with detachable long sleeves and over-the-knee socks, shown from front, side and back.

title: Volume 02 — Bell-Sleeve Flare
description: Lace-up bell-sleeve crop over lace-up flared trousers.
alt: Model in a black lace-up bell-sleeve crop top with matching lace-up flared trousers, shown in two poses.

title: Volume 03 — Hooded Zip
description: Thumbhole hooded zip and micro short.
alt: Model in a black hooded zip top with thumbhole sleeves, black micro shorts and lace-up tall boots, shown from front, side and back.

title: Volume 04 — Lace-Up Court
description: Lace-up tank crop and ruched mini, knee boots.
alt: Model in a black lace-up crop tank and ruched lace-up mini skirt with a lace-up choker and knee-high boots, shown from front, side and back.

title: Volume 05 — Blush Pleat
description: Washed-pink corset top and pleated mini — editorial.
alt: Model with long pink hair and pink fairy wings in a pink corset top and pleated mini skirt, side profile against a pale mint backdrop.

title: Volume 06 — Star Corset
description: Star-print corset, buckled mini and jacket — shot on blue leather.
alt: Overhead shot of a model reclining on a blue leather sofa in a black star-print corset, buckled black mini skirt, open black jacket, sunglasses and chunky black sneakers.

title: Volume 07 — Hedonist
description: Tie-dye shorts and hooded jacket — motion, streetwear.
alt: Person in motion in an open black hooded jacket, red-and-black tie-dye knee shorts with a silver chain and chunky pink high-top sneakers, in front of a white studio wall stencilled "HEDONIST".
